description_long: This is a modern, box-shaped house surrounded by lush, leafy trees with pink blossoms, creating a secluded and tranquil atmosphere. The house features a flat roof and a minimalist white facade, accented by large windows and a few wooden panels. The structure appears to be two stories tall, with the upper floor slightly set back, providing a small balcony or terrace area. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large panes offering expansive views and natural light. The main entryway is simple, with a single door and no prominent porch or steps, emphasizing the clean lines of the design. The surrounding trees form a partial ring around the house, enhancing privacy and blending the building into a natural setting.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, and wooden accents, surrounded by dense, blossoming trees. The minimalist design and asymmetrical window placement create a contemporary, secluded feel.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house partially obscured by trees, with the main entryway and a glimpse of the interior visible through large windows.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the front facade with a prominent window and door, as well as the surrounding trees forming a semi-circle.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the side of the house with more visible windows and a wooden accent wall, framed by dense foliage.
description_view_3: View 3 presents the rear of the house, showing a flat roof, additional windows, and the thickest concentration of trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist single door with no porch or steps, integrated into the facade with clean lines and no decorative elements
